facebook.caption:
4.8 stars. 864 reviews. On a street most tourists never walk down.

Phở Hòa on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo is where locals in Phú Quốc actually eat pho. Not the resort version. The real bowl, the real broth, the real price.

If you're skipping this because it doesn't have an English menu out front, that's on you.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the broth hit the bowl. That color, that steam. Phở Hòa has 864 reviews and a 4.8 rating for exactly this reason. Find it on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo before the tourists do.

instagram.caption:

Đường Trần Hưng Đạo. Go find it.
